title: Dungeons Optimized
description: This modpack only includes optimization mods and the mods which are essential to play dungeons in hypixel skyblock.
body:
A highly optimized SkyBlock modpack designed specifically for players who love dungeons but want smoother, more responsive controls than typical modded experiences provide. Unlike most modpacks, which prioritize content quantity over performance quality, this pack places its primary focus on reducing input lag.


performance mods this modpack includes:

badoptimizations,
confirm disconnect,
cubes without borders,
entity culling
more culling,
sodium,
sodium extras,
immediatelyfast,
krypton,
lithium,
mod menu,
modern fix,
network protocol disconnect,
reese's sodium options, 
reflex antilag,
scalable lux 

hypixel specific mods:

Devonian

main features of hypixel mods: 

dungeon map and all map related features,  
dungeon qol,
animation tweaks, 
highlight starred mobs, 
dungeon waypoints,
position messages,
terminal solvers,
device solvers,
puzzle solvers,
custom leap menu,
key shortcuts,
command aliases,
protect item,
slot locking,
slot binding,
no render options,
croesus profit

Resource packs this modpack includes:

Defrosted,
Mini items.



I did not include other famous skyblock mods because they reduce your performance and they don't have any feature worth using which this modpack doesn't have
